case_title: RUI XIONG YE VS. NADER HEYDAYIAN et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YE, RUI XIONG AS TO DEFENDANT HEYDAYIAN, NADER DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-04-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-12-2014

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GC 68608(B) BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. THE COURT ALSO ORDERS THAT COUNSEL BE REPORTED TO THE STATE BAR FOR FAILING TO APPEAR AT SEVERAL ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARINGS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-04-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-16-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The State Bar is to be notified of all the sanction orders as required by Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7 (a)(3). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Sep-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to SEP-15-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Notification of Reportable Sanctions as required by Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7 (A)(3).*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
